📸 Visual Cue & Form: Bench flat. Lie on back. Push DBs straight up over your chest, bringing them down until elbows hit 90 degrees.
Bench at 30-45° angle. Press DBs up. Targets the upper chest.
Bench backrest straight up (90°). Sit and press DBs overhead until arms are extended.
Stand straight. Hold light DBs at your sides. Raise arms out like wings until parallel to the floor.
Sit on bench. Hold one heavy DB with both hands behind your head. Extend arms straight up.
Hang from the bar. Pull your chin over the bar. (AMRAP = As Many Reps As Possible).
Knee and hand on flat bench. Back flat. Pull the DB up to your hip like starting a lawnmower.
Lie flat on bench. Hold one DB with both hands straight over chest. Lower it behind your head, then pull back up.
Stand up. Palms facing forward. Curl DBs up to your shoulders. Control the weight on the way down.
Same as bicep curl, but palms face each other (like holding a hammer). Great for forearms.
Hold one heavy DB vertically against your chest. Squat down until your thighs are below parallel.
Hold DBs in front of thighs. Keep legs mostly straight (slight bend). Push hips back until you feel a stretch in hamstrings.
Stand a few feet in front of bench. Rest one foot behind you on the bench. Squat down on the front leg. Warning: It burns.
Sit on bench edge. Rest heavy DBs on your knees. Lift your heels off the ground as high as possible.
Lie flat on floor or bench. Hold a light DB on your chest. Crunch your shoulders off the pad.
